name: Smoke / Production-Verify Probe
description: After a deploy lands, GET a battery of health paths against the deployed URL and gate CI on the verdict. Read-only: it issues GETs and classifies them, mutating nothing. Fail-closed — a connection error, timeout, wrong status, or missing body substring is a FAIL, and ANY failing check fails the overall verdict (exit non-zero) so CI gates on it.
note: Mechanical post-deploy verify step of the release lifecycle; no skill file of its own — it composes under the ci-release-orchestrator skill (after the deploy lands, this probes the running surface).

invoke.output: a PASS/FAIL/SKIP line per check + an overall PASS/FAIL verdict; structured report under --json; exit non-zero on any FAIL

observability.outcome: per-check verdict { path, status, verdict, reason } + overall { verdict, counts }; exit code gates CI (0 only when PASS)
